page_title: Surviving Hypernovelty: Why Source Receipts Matter

claim_list.claim: Answer-layer systems make clear claim/source/date structure more important for public-facing knowledge pages.

claim_list.claim: A source-confidence ledger improves review discipline but does not guarantee factual correctness or third-party citation.
